ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pollution_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollution site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollution site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "pollution_type" TEXT /* Type of pollution emitted by the site */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the pollution */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Level of pollution emitted by the site */,
  "emission_type" TEXT /* Type of emission */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Size of the pollution site */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the site */,
  "commissioning_date" TEXT /* Date the site was commissioned */,
  "decommissioning_date" TEXT /* Date the site was decommissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_use" (
  "land_use_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land use type */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land use */,
  "proportion" REAL /* Proportion of land covered by this use type */,
  "land_use_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the land use type */,
  "land_use_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the land use type */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the land use data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("land_use_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forest_types" (
  "forest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forest type */,
  "forest_type" TEXT /* Type of forest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forest type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the forest type */,
  "type_characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the forest type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_types" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development type */,
  "development_type" TEXT /* Type of development */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the development type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the development type */,
  "type_characteristics" TEXT /* Characteristics of the development type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mortality rate data used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to generate the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_models" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "mortality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mortality rate data used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "scenario_date" TEXT /* Date the scenario was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "predicted_mortality_rate" REAL /* Predicted mortality rate based on the scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the scenario */,
  "data_used" TEXT /* Data used to create the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario that uses this input */,
  "input_name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "input_value" TEXT /* Value of the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_model_inputs_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenario_models ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scenario that generated this output */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "output_value" TEXT /* Value of the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_model_outputs_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenario_models ("scenario_id")
)
